name: Crescent Puff S'mores
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Pillsbury Refrigerated Quick Crescent Dinner Rolls
2 milk chocolate candy bars (1.2 ounces each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Separate the crescent dough into 16 triangles.
3. Place a marshmallow on the wide end of each triangle.
4. Top each marshmallow with chocolate pieces.
5. Fold the corners over the marshmallow and chocolate, rolling toward the opposite point to completely cover them. Seal well.
6. Dip or brush each roll with melted butter.
7. Roll in graham cracker crumbs.
8. Place the rolls in 16 ungreased deep muffin cups.
9. Bake for 1-20 minutes until golden brown. Remove from pan immediately and serve warm.
